title: Kal (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kal''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Haruun Kal]]''', a [[planet]] in the [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]]
*The '''[[kal]]''', a traditional [[Mandalorian]] [[dagger]]

==Legends==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Kal (Human)|Kal]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]]
*'''[[Kal (bodyguard)|Kal]]''', a bodyguard to [[Kai Hudorra]]
*'''[[Kal (Belsavis)|Kal]]''', a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]
*'''[[Kal Braggan]]''', a member of the [[Corellian Security Force]]
*'''[[Kal Brigger]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]
*'''[[Kal Clancy]]''', a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*'''[[Kal-Don]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Kal Jorek]]''', a smuggler
*'''[[Kal Lup]]''', a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]]
*'''[[Kal Skirata]]''', a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]
===Other===
*'''[[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dustig sector/Legends|Dustig sector]]
*'''Kal zet Berri''', an alias used by '''[[Garik Loran]]'''
*'''''Kal''''', the [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']] word for [[Knife/Legends|knife]]
**The '''[[Kal/Legends|kal]]''', a traditional Mandalorian dagger

{{Disambig}}

|de=Kal
